title: Mark Carney becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Mark Joseph Carney is a Canadian politician and economist who has served as the 24th prime minister of Canada since 2025.

title: Justin Trudeau becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Justin Pierre James Trudeau is a Canadian politician who served as the 23rd prime minister of Canada from 2015 to 2025.

title: Pierre Trudeau becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Joseph Philippe Pierre Yves Elliott Trudeau was a Canadian politician and lawyer who served as the 15th prime minister of Canada from 1968 to 1979 and from 1980 to 1984.

title: Stephen Harper becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Stephen Joseph Harper is a Canadian politician who served as the 22nd prime minister of Canada from 2006 to 2015.

title: Jean Chrétien becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Joseph Jacques Jean Chrétien is a Canadian lawyer and former politician who served as the 20th prime minister of Canada from 1993 to 2003.

title: Brian Mulroney becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Martin Brian Mulroney was a Canadian lawyer, businessman, and politician who served as the 18th prime minister of Canada from 1984 to 1993.

title: William Lyon Mackenzie King becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: William Lyon Mackenzie King was the prime minister of Canada for three non-consecutive terms from 1921 to 1926, 1926 to 1930, and 1935 to 1948.

title: John A. Macdonald becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Sir John Alexander Macdonald was the first prime minister of Canada, serving from 1867 to 1873 and from 1878 until his death in 1891.

title: Kim Campbell becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Avril Phaedra Douglas "Kim" Campbell is a Canadian politician who was the 19th prime minister of Canada from June to November 1993.

title: Lester B. Pearson becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Lester Bowles Pearson was a Canadian politician, diplomat, and scholar who served as the 14th prime minister of Canada from 1963 to 1968.

title: Paul Martin becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Paul Edgar Philippe Martin, also known as Paul Martin Jr., is a Canadian lawyer and retired politician who served as the 21st prime minister of Canada and the leader of the Liberal Party of Canada from 2003 to 2006.

title: Joe Clark becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Charles Joseph Clark is a Canadian businessman, writer, and retired politician who served as the 16th prime minister of Canada from 1979 to 1980.

title: John Diefenbaker becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: John George Diefenbaker was the 13th prime minister of Canada, serving from 1957 to 1963.

title: Wilfrid Laurier becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Sir Henri Charles Wilfrid Laurier was the seventh prime minister of Canada from 1896 to 1911.

title: John Turner becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: John Napier Wyndham Turner was the 17th prime minister of Canada, serving from June to September 1984.

title: Robert Borden becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Sir Robert Laird Borden was a Canadian lawyer and politician who served as the eighth prime minister of Canada, serving from 1911 to 1920.

title: John Abbott becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Sir John Joseph Caldwell Abbott was the third prime minister of Canada, serving from 1891 to 1892.

title: Richard Bedford Bennett becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Richard Bedford Bennett, 1st Viscount Bennett was a Canadian lawyer, businessman, philanthropist, and politician who served as the 11th prime minister of Canada from 1930 to 1935.

title: Alexander Mackenzie becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Alexander Mackenzie was a Scottish-Canadian stonemason and politician who served as the second prime minister of Canada from 1873 to 1878.

title: Charles Tupper becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Sir Charles Tupper, 1st Baronet, was a Canadian Father of Confederation who served as the sixth prime minister of Canada from May 1 to July 8, 1896.

title: Arthur Meighen becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Arthur Meighen was a Canadian lawyer and politician who served as the ninth prime minister of Canada from 1920 to 1921 and from June to September 1926.

title: John Sparrow David Thompson becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Sir John Sparrow David Thompson was the fourth prime minister of Canada, serving from 1892 until his death in 1894.

title: Mackenzie Bowell becomes prime minister of Canada
fact: Sir Mackenzie Bowell was the fifth prime minister of Canada, serving from 1894 to 1896.
